title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model called Oceanus V1-P (possibly Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, math, and agentic tasks, reporting a perfect 70/70 score. The model reportedly outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and others on tasks including web apps, game development, combinatorics, and fine-tuning workflows.
